description: [ping] - Default Linux Journey network diagnostsics packet test. Sourced directly from Linux Journey curriculum foundations.

commands.description: Send continuous ICMP echo requests to target host
commands.explanation: Executes the ping routine logically to process: send continuous icmp echo requests to target host

commands.description: Send exactly 4 pings and exit automatically
commands.explanation: Executes the ping routine logically to process: send exactly 4 pings and exit automatically

commands.description: Ping with an interval of half a second
commands.explanation: Executes the ping routine logically to process: ping with an interval of half a second
